post.description:
Provide an array of business details

The service iterates through all entries in the array and returns the results of what it was able to do.

Failed items have their own section to make it clearer.

post.description:
Provide an array of business details

The service iterates through all entries in the array and returns the results of what it was able to do.

Failed items have their own section to make it clearer.

post.summary: Validate Businesses with Applicant ID in CSV Mode
post.description:
Provide an array of business details

The service iterates through all entries in the array and returns the results of what it was able to do.

Failed items have their own section to make it clearer.

examples:
customer_unique_identifier,company_name,dba,tax_id,mcc,status,website_url,business_email,business_street_address,business_street_address_2,business_city,business_state,business_postal_code,business_country_code,business_type,year_established,score_retrieval_date

Failed items have their own section to make it clearer.

Any record(s) that fail will be highlighted.

get.description:
# Get Customer Onboarding Stages Configuration

This endpoint retrieves the onboarding stages configuration for a specific customer.

## Request

### URL

``` plaintext
GET {{case_url_v1}}/customers/:customerID/onboarding-stages-config

 ```

### Path Parameters

- `customerID` (string, required): The unique identifier of the customer.
    

## Response

- Status: 200 OK
    
- Content-Type: application/json
    

``` json
{
    "status": "success",
    "message": "customer onboarding stages configuration fetched successfully",
    "data": [
        {
            "core_stage_id": 1,
            "stage": "company",
            "version": 0,
            "priority_order": 1,
            "completion_weightage": 15,
            "allow_back_nav": false,
            "is_skippable": false,
            "is_enabled": true,
            "prev_stage": null,
            "next_stage": 2
        },
        {
            "core_stage_id": 2,
            "stage": "company additional info",
            "version": 0,
            "priority_order": 2,
            "completion_weightage": 5,
            "allow_back_nav": true,
            "is_skippable": false,
            "is_enabled": true,
            "prev_stage": 1,
            "next_stage": 3
        },
        {
            "core_stage_id": 3,
            "stage": "banking",
            "version": 0,
            "priority_order": 3,
            "completion_weightage": 20,
            "allow_back_nav": true,
            "is_skippable": false,
            "is_enabled": true,
            "prev_stage": 2,
            "next_stage": 4
        },
        {
            "core_stage_id": 4,
            "stage": "ownership",
            "version": 0,
            "priority_order": 4,
            "completion_weightage": 20,
            "allow_back_nav": true,
            "is_skippable": false,
            "is_enabled": true,
            "prev_stage": 3,
            "next_stage": 5
        },
        {
            "core_stage_id": 5,
            "stage": "accounting",
            "version": 0,
            "priority_order": 5,
            "completion_weightage": 20,
            "allow_back_nav": true,
            "is_skippable": true,
            "is_enabled": true,
            "prev_stage": 4,
            "next_stage": 6
        },
        {
            "core_stage_id": 6,
            "stage": "tax consent",
            "version": 0,
            "priority_order": 6,
            "completion_weightage": 20,
            "allow_back_nav": true,
            "is_skippable": true,
            "is_enabled": true,
            "prev_stage": 5,
            "next_stage": 7
        },
        {
            "core_stage_id": 7,
            "stage": "custom fields",
            "version": 0,
            "priority_order": 7,
            "completion_weightage": 0,
            "allow_back_nav": true,
            "is_skippable": false,
            "is_enabled": true,
            "prev_stage": 6,
            "next_stage": 8
        },
        {
            "core_stage_id": 8,
            "stage": "review",
            "version": 0,
            "priority_order": 8,
            "completion_weightage": 0,
            "allow_back_nav": true,
            "is_skippable": false,
            "is_enabled": true,
            "prev_stage": 7,
            "next_stage": null
        }
    ]
}

 ```

The response will contain an array of onboarding stage configurations for the specified customer, including details such as stage ID, version, priority order, completion weightage, navigation settings, and stage enablement.

get.description: Retrieves a list of businesses related to the one specified by the given businessID.

Retrieves custom fields associated with a specified business ID. Custom fields must be enabled to utilize this endpoint. To confirm if you have custom fields enabled, please reach out to your Customer Success representative.

parameters.name: pagination
parameters.description: Boolean indicating whether results should be paginated or not.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Integer value of which page to retrieve.

parameters.name: itemsPerPage
parameters.description: Integer value for how many results should be included per page.
